'''''Vagrant''''' was a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]]. Along with two [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]], the [[Nexus (Carrack-class)|''Nexus'']] and the [[Xerxes (Carrack-class)|''Xerxes'']], the ''Vagrant'' attempted to stop the [[Defiance Task Force]] from rendezvousing with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel fleet]] at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. They were held back by [[A-wing]]s, two of which were piloted by [[Olin Garn]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
